name: Cochrane CD008873_pub5 analysis 2: Maternal adverse events
citation: Cochrane review CD008873_pub5 (DOI 10.1002/14651858.CD008873.pub5). Binary 2x2 data extracted via Pairwise70/cochrane-data-extractor; reference = metafor rma (REML) from pairwise70 ma4_metafor_validation.csv.
note: Engine REML reproduces the metafor pooled estimate to <5e-6 on this real Cochrane dataset. Re-verify against the source review forest plot before external citation.
